feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Kaine says guardrails on Pentagon firings could see bipartisan support
entry.content: Sen. Tim Kaine said guardrails on Pentagon firings could see bipartisan support in Congress, following a string of high-level officers exiting the military during the second Trump administration.

entry.title: Sen. Bill Cassidy accuses RFK Jr. of building public health "upon a foundation of lies"
entry.content: Sen. Bill Cassidy, who delivered the key vote to advance Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s nomination, told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that "if you build public health upon a foundation of lies, then you're going to have the absence of adequate public health."

entry.title: Transcript: Sen. Tim Kaine on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," June 28, 2026
entry.content: The following is the transcript of an interview with Sen. Tim Kaine, Democrat of Virginia, that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on June 28, 2026.

entry.title: Jan Crawford says remaining Supreme Court decisions could be a "mixed bag" for Trump
entry.content: Jan Crawford, CBS News' chief legal correspondent, says that she believes the remaining Supreme Court decisions will be a "mixed bag" for President Trump.

entry.title: Face the Nation: Kaine, Cassidy, Crawford
entry.content: Missed the second half of the show? Sens. Tim Kaine and Bill Cassidy and CBS News chief legal correspondent Jan Crawford join.

entry.title: Sen. Tim Kaine says guardrails on Pentagon firings could see bipartisan support in Congress
entry.content: Democratic Sen. Tim Kaine of Virginia told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that he believes there could be bipartisan support for guardrails on Pentagon firings in the aftermath of the departure of Gen. Chris Donahue, the commander of U.S. Army Europe and Africa.

entry.title: 5 nurses among 11 killed in French skydiving plane crash
entry.content: Mayor Mathieu Klein said the victims "died in full view of their loved ones, who were preparing to film the tandem skydives."

entry.title: Douglas Brinkley on America at 250: History tells us hoping for unity is not futile
entry.content: In these fiercely-polarized times, the presidential historian reminds us that Americans' freedom has been tested – and has survived – much worse.

entry.title: TechCrunch Mobility: All eyes on Tesla FSD
entry.content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

entry.title: Novig Promo Code TSNEWS50: Use $50 Bonus for South Africa-Canada, More World Cup Trades
entry.content: Play $5 with the Novig promo code TSNEWS50 and score a $50 bonus for World Cup predictions during the knockout round.

entry.title: World Cup Prediction App Promos: Get Best Offers for Knockout Stage
entry.content: Learn how to use the best World Cup prediction app promos ahead of Canada-South Africa and other matches.

entry.title: How to fill out World Cup bracket 2026: Sample and tips to help you make the best picks for FIFA champion
entry.content: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has been full of thrills, surprises, and excitement as 48 teams vie for the one global championship available at the end of the journey.

entry.title: Storm's Flau'jae Johnson joins elite rookie company with A'ja Wilson and Candace Parker
entry.content: Storm's Flau'jae Johnson joins elite rookie company with A'ja Wilson and Candace Parker

entry.title: Fever's two wins without Caitlin Clark contain one startling truth
entry.content: The Fever surged past the struggling Sparks.

entry.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
entry.content: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.

entry.title: What time is Canada vs. South Africa? Live stream, TV channel, kickoff schedule for World Cup 2026 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the South Africa vs. Canada World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: South Africa vs. Canada free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the South Africa vs. Canada World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Govee’s smart nugget ice maker makes every iced drink feel like a luxury
entry.content: For some people, the ice in a beverage is almost as important as the drink itself. That’s the audience Govee had in mind when designing its latest ice maker, the GoveeLife Smart Nugget Ice Maker Pro. This $500 premium smart home gadget is aimed at those who crave what’s called “the good ice,” the soft, chewable […]

entry.title: Flock cameras track more than your license plate, and they're spreading fast
entry.content: Mounting privacy and security issues have residents and activists concerned.

entry.title: Goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa’s emotional World Cup farewell leaves lasting legacy for Mexico fans
entry.content: When Guillermo Ochoa stepped onto the pitch in the 78th minute of Mexico’s match with Czechia on Wednesday night, the stadium let out a roar that seemed to reverberate across the country and beyond.

entry.title: These church members disagree on politics. Together they're wiping out medical debt
entry.content: Trinity Moravian Church, a politically diverse congregation in Winston-Salem, N. C., has been raising money to retire medical debt in the surrounding community.

entry.title: India vs Ireland 2nd T20I Live Streaming: When and where to watch as Shreyas Iyer's India seek series-saving win
entry.content: India looks to even the T20I series with Ireland following a disappointing defeat in the opener. While Ireland's Lorcan Tucker and Gareth Delany propelled their team to 182 runs, India's batsmen fell short, apart from a brief rally by Shivam Dube. The team now faces a pivotal match in Belfast to turn things around.

entry.title: Zlatan Ibrahimovic overwhelmed as Bosnia and Herzegovina makes World Cup history
entry.content: Zlatan Ibrahimovic was visibly moved while working as a FOX analyst when Bosnia and Herzegovina beat Qatar 3-1 to reach the World Cup knockout stage for the first time, citing his father's Bosnian roots

entry.title: Wisconsin's latest commit extends decade-long dominance over Minnesota
entry.content: Baboucarr Ann's commitment to the Wisconsin Badgers followed quite an interesting trend.

entry.title: Jude Bellingham hints at how Real Madrid can unlock his best form
entry.content: Despite his underwhelming last two years at Real Madrid, the English midfielder Jude Bellingham is seemingly back to his very best as he vies for the World Cup 2026 title with his national team.The En...

entry.title: Why Scotland and Dithering Dave are a Match Made in Purgatory
entry.content: If there is one thing we Evertonians know intimately, it is the profound, soul-sapping embrace of deliberately lowered expectations. So, as the Scottish FA reels from Steve Clarke’s utterly predict...

entry.title: Update on O.J. Simpson and Bills' new Highmark Stadium
entry.content: An update on the Bills and former running back OJ Simpson.

entry.title: GB's Davis beaten by Shabliy at PFL San Diego
entry.content: Britain's Alfie Davis loses to Alexander Shabliy via unanimous points decision in their PFL lightweight bout at the Pechanga Arena in San Diego on Saturday.

entry.title: What does next Scotland head coach look like as 'monster job' awaits?
entry.content: BBC Scotland looks at the key questions around the appointment of Steve Clarke's successor.

entry.title: Venezuelan earthquakes test Trump’s new western hemisphere policy after gutting of USAID
entry.content: Marco Rubio is scrambling to provide effective disaster response to country whose president US deposed in JanuaryThis week’s dual earthquakes in Venezuela are a test for the new era of American power in the western hemisphere, as the Trump administration scrambles to provide an effective disaster response mission to a country that it now calls an ally in Latin America, after a US special forces raid in January deposed the country’s strongman leader, Nicolás Maduro.The US is marshalling what secretary of state Marco Rubio called a “big, fast, effective” and “whole-of-government” response as the state department sent three specialised urban search and rescue teams and pledged a $150m assistance fund that one former disaster relief expert called the largest he had seen within 24 hours of an incident. Continue reading...

entry.title: How Some Private-Equity Managers Collect Big Fees on Paper Gains
entry.content: The fee structures are among the pitfalls of investing in semiliquid funds.

entry.title: Where to watch South Africa vs. Canada live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 32 match
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the South Africa vs. Canada World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Dry, windy conditions fuel explosive wildfire growth across western US
entry.content: Wildfire activity intensified across the western United States over the weekend, with strong winds and dry conditions fueling flames and forcing evacuations in many spots

entry.title: A new law could create a list of immigrants illegally living in Mississippi. Advocates are alarmed
entry.content: A new Mississippi law authorizes the state's top law enforcement agency to compile a list of immigrants illegally living in the state

entry.title: LGBTQ+ Pride parades set for Sunday in NYC and San Francisco
entry.content: Pride Month celebrations are peaking with big parades in New York, San Francisco and some other cities on Sunday

entry.title: Indian payments chief thinks AI will be heavily involved in next era of digital payment growth
entry.content: Dilip Asbe said that newer UPI apps could be more competitive with a viable commercial model

entry.title: How Algeria, Austria advanced to World Cup knockout stage with dramatic draw to end group play
entry.content: Here's why both teams playing in the last game of the group stage qualified for the Round of 32.

entry.title: World Cup Round of 32 bracket: Updated schedule, results for 2026 FIFA knockout round
entry.content: Here's a look at the Round of 32 bracket for the 2026 World Cup.

entry.title: Deandre Ayton is not going anywhere with his plans of exercising his player option
entry.content: Deandre Ayton seems prepared to stay with the Lakers for one more year.

entry.title: World Cup Golden Boot live rankings: Updated goal totals for Messi, Mbappe and more 2026 scoring leaders
entry.content: Here are the players at the top of this World Cup's chart so far as the leading scorers.

entry.title: World Cup bracket predictions 2026: Expert picks for Round of 32 and every FIFA knockout game
entry.content: The first 48-team field in World Cup history has been reduced to 32. But who is going to go all the way?

entry.title: Detective believes 6-year-old's mother was killed in next room while he slept
entry.content: For most of his life, Reggie Reed has wondered who murdered his mother Selonia Reed decades ago in Hammond, Louisiana. A fresh look at the evidence ultimately implicated the man he called his "rock" — Reginald Reed Sr., the man who lovingly raised him.

entry.title: "48 Hours" show schedule
entry.content: True crime. Real justice. To miss it would be a crime.

entry.title: Mets bullpen continues to dominate, pick up Christian Scott in win over Phillies
entry.content: The Mets bullpen has been the most consistent part of the 2026 team and they continued to dominate Saturday in New York's win over the Phillies.

entry.title: Benches clear, punches thrown in Rainiers-Express scuffle at Cheney Stadium
entry.content: Rainiers 3B Patrick Wisdom’s second hit by pitch in as many innings sparked the altercation near the first base dugout at Cheney Stadium.

entry.title: Job done - but England will not win World Cup unless they improve
entry.content: England did their job topping the group - but they can forget winning the World Cup if they do not improve, writes Phil McNulty.

entry.title: Four takeaways from Iona Prep & Stepinac at CHSAA basketball team camp
entry.content: Stepinac has been the top program in the CHSAA for the last four seasons, but graduated five Division I players.

entry.title: Who will England play next at World Cup? Last-32 opponent and route to final revealed
entry.content: England secured top spot in Group L with a 2-0 win against Panama in New Jersey on Saturday

entry.title: Zayas vs. Boots Highlights, Streaming Updates TONIGHT!
entry.content: Xander Zayas will defend his WBA and WBO Light Middleweight titles later TONIGHT (Sat., June 27, 2026) against interim WBA champion, Jaron “Boots” Ennis, in a highly-anticipated title fight streaming live on DAZN PPV. Zayas, the 23-year old Puerto Rican phenom with a 23-0 mark, is looking for the biggest win of his career by […]

entry.title: PFL San Diego Highlights, Streaming Updates TONIGHT!
entry.content: Professional Fighters League (PFL) is set to stage PFL San Diego later TONIGHT (Sat., June 27, 2026) inside Pechanga Arena in San Diego, California. Headlining the event will be a Featherweight fight between A.J. McKee Jr. and undefeated rising star, Salamat Isbulaev, who sits at a perfect 10-0, 1-0 PFL. In further action, former Ultimate […]

entry.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (June 28)
entry.content: Jane Pauley hosts a special program celebrating our nation's semiquincentennial, "These United States - America at 250."

entry.title: European Soccer Fans Marvel at the Splendor of America’s Suburbs
entry.content: Dutch fans in Missouri see a nation that is risky and expensive, but vast and bountiful.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
Success lies in the hands of those who wants it.
Lucky Numbers: 47, 7, 9, 33, 19, 49

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Bring Tupperware containers to farmers markets for small, delicate things like berries. Most vendors just bag such things, and then they get smashed.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: By raising your legs slowly and lying on your back, you cannot sink into quicksand.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Isaac Newton
entry.content: “Truth is the offspring of silence and meditation.” — Isaac Newton

entry.title: What news reports from 1600s tell us about life in Mughal India
entry.content: What news reports from 1600s tell us about life in Mughal India

entry.title: England vs. Panama live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup Group L match
entry.content: England hope to put their struggles against a low block to bed and secure a spot atop Group L as they wrap up the group stage with a game against Panama from MetLife Stadium on Saturday.

entry.title: England live player ratings vs. Panama: Grading World Cup Group L performances as Morgan Rogers, Jarell Quansah start
entry.content: Live assessment of the players on show as England conclude Group L with a game against Panama.

entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Jordan vs. Argentina World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: Portugal vs. Colombia live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup Group K deciding match
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for Portugal vs. Colombia in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow for complete results from the Group K match in Miami.

entry.title: Jaylen Brown takes exception to Bobby Marks report: ‘Analytics are ruining the game’
entry.content: The Celtics forward defended himself against a report that diminished his success last season.

entry.title: Argentina vs. Jordan live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup Group J match
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for Argentina vs. Jordan in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow for complete results from the Group J match in Dallas.

entry.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
entry.content: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

entry.title: Trump Taps Lance Schroyer as ICE Director
entry.content: The Oklahoma law-enforcement veteran has been nominated to lead the agency responsible for the administration’s deportation efforts.

entry.title: Instagram is testing more ways to customize ‘Your Algorithm’
entry.content: Instagram users could soon see more ways to tune their content.

entry.title: Knicks' Jordan Clarkson makes Paris Fashion Week runway debut
entry.content: Jordan Clarkson just won an NBA Championship with the New York Knicks.

entry.title: Trump nominates former Oklahoma trooper Lance Schroyer to be ICE director
entry.content: President Trump on Saturday said he has nominated Lance Schroyer to be the next director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

entry.title: USA World Cup bracket predictions: Expert picks for USMNT in 2026 knockout phase
entry.content: The United States national team is into the knockout round of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, meaning the first task has been completed. So, how far can they go?

entry.title: We Investigated Damage From Iran to a U.S. Naval Base. Here’s What We Found.
entry.content: Satellite imagery, social-media footage and Defense Department records revealed the extent of damage to the U.S. Navy’s Mideast headquarters in Bahrain.

entry.title: Former Broncos cornerback signs with AFC North team
entry.content: The Denver Broncos recently moved on from Ahmari Harvey, who has found a new team before training camps open.

entry.title: Angel Reese's coach rips WNBA officials after Dream loss: 'Excuse after excuse'
entry.content: The league has a problem.

entry.title: DR Congo vs. Uzbekistan free live stream: How to watch World Cup game online without cable
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know to watch the DR Congo vs. Uzbekistan World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.

entry.title: New York judge rules in favor of transgender athlete booted from women's track meet
entry.content: A New York judge ruled against a university that blocked a transgender athlete from competing in a women's track meet, saying that state law banning discrimination based on gender identity supersedes President Trump's executive order on female sports.

entry.title: Trump-backed Letlow faces Fleming in Louisiana GOP Senate runoff
entry.content: President Donald Trump's preferred candidate for U.S. Senate in Louisiana is looking to clinch the GOP nomination Saturday and deliver another win for the president, who has sought to replace Republicans who cross him with hand-picked loyalists.

entry.title: Venezuela earthquakes: death toll rises again to more than 1,400
entry.content: Search for survivors continues with nearly 70,000 people reported unaccounted for by their family membersThe ⁠death toll ⁠in ⁠the twin ​earthquakes which struck ⁠Venezuela earlier ⁠this ​week ‌has ‌risen to ‌1,430, according to one of the country’s top politicians Jorge Rodríguez.Another 3,200 ​people were injured ⁠and 3,100 ​left homeless ​by the ​disaster, ​the National Assembly president added, speaking ​on ​state television. Continue reading...

entry.title: Here's your daily reminder that you don't own digital content
entry.content: People in Europe will soon lose access to Studio Canal movies they paid for on the PlayStation Store.

entry.title: Utah declares emergency, limits fireworks as crews battle largest U.S. wildfire
entry.content: Utah is restricting fireworks as the largest wildfire in the nation grows, fueled by dry conditions and gusting winds.

entry.title: Iranian drones target Bahrain after U.S. strikes Iran
entry.content: The U.S. carried out retaliatory strikes against Iran on Friday after Iranian forces hit a cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz a day earlier.

entry.title: Ann Blyth, Oscar nominee for 'Mildred Pierce,' dies at 98
entry.content: Appearing as the amoral daughter of Joan Crawford at only age 17, Blyth in her short film career worked with many top stars of Hollywood's classic era.

entry.title: Are smart bulbs more expensive to run than standard LEDs?
entry.content: Do the benefits of features like dimming and scheduling make up for the constant energy draw needed for connectivity?

entry.title: Michigan parents charged with murder after boy found to be 250+ pounds
entry.content: Two Flint Township, Michigan, parents, are facing several charges, including second-degree murder, in the death of their 7-year-old son, who was 255 pounds and abused and neglected, according to the Genesee County prosecutor.

entry.title: Venezuela death toll rises as search for earthquake survivors continues
entry.content: Venezuelans have taken the search for missing loved ones into their own hands, citing a scarcity of government rescuers.

entry.title: Buffalo Bills' Deven Thompkins hosts annual football camp at Dunbar
entry.content: Thompkins, who signed with the Buffalo Bills in June, is entering his fifth NFL season after going undrafted in 2022.

entry.title: Barcelona star to be offered to AC Milan
entry.content: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has this weekend been tipped for a summer move to Italy with AC Milan.The player in question? Marc Casadó.Youngster Casadó is of course wid...

entry.title: Official: Venezia buy Lisman from Lech Poznan
entry.content: Venezia have officially purchased wide attacking player Korel Lisman from Lech Poznan in a deal believed to be worth €2m.The 20-year-old passed his medical tests and put pen to paper on a contract u...

entry.title: UFC Baku Results: Fiziev vs. Torres
entry.content: Rafael Fiziev tries to get back on track against Manuel Torres at UFC Baku

entry.title: Ravens roster bubble: Defensive players who need to stand out in camp
entry.content: Adisa Isaac, Kaimon Rucker, Carl Jones Jr., Amani Oruwariye, Bilhal Kone, Jahquez Robinson, and Aaron Graves enter Ravens training camp needing to stand out.

entry.title: UFC Baku live results, highlights and play-by-play
entry.content: UFC Baku results, highlights, live discussion and instant play-by-play, reactions and analysis.

entry.title: England in huge danger in third Test against NZ
entry.content: England’s deciding Test against New Zealand - and perhaps the future of the hosts’ management - hangs in the balance after a dramatic and fluctuating third day at Trent Bridge.

entry.title: Jaylen Brown take from ‘analytics guy’ is the worst one ever
entry.content: We officially have the worst Jaylen Brown take ever as trade rumors swirl around the Boston Celtics star.

entry.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
entry.content: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

entry.title: Germany, Denmark, Switzerland hit heat records as Europe sizzles
entry.content: Germany hit a high of 106 degrees on Saturday, according to the country's national weather service.

entry.title: Meet the voice behind your favorite cartoon characters
entry.content: Jeff Bergman, who voices nearly all of the modern Looney Tunes cast, sits down with "CBS Saturday Morning" to talk about stepping in for Don Rickles as Mr. Potato Head in "Toy Story 5."

entry.title: How Chef Tim Love helped define the Fort Worth food scene
entry.content: Chef Tim Love sits down with "CBS Saturday Morning" to share some of the inspiration for bringing bold flavors to Fort Worth, Texas.

entry.title: Wildlife photographer shares the beauty of Yellowstone National Park through his lens
entry.content: In the series "USA to Z," which celebrates 250 years of American history and culture, Kelly O'Grady sits down with wildlife photographer Tom Murphy to talk about Yellowstone National Park and the importance of preservation.

entry.title: Dissident who fled China by boat arrives in Canada, his friend says
entry.content: Dong Guangping landed in Toronto following an Air Canada flight on Friday, his friend said.

entry.title: Saturday Sessions: Kevin Morby performs "Javelin"
entry.content: Kansas City-based singer-songwriter Kevin Morby has been likened to Bob Dylan and Tom Petty, with his rich, soulful lyrics across eight studio albums. His latest album, "Little Wide Open" was produced by The National's Aaron Dessner. Here's Kevin Morby performing "Javelin."

entry.title: Saturday Sessions: Kevin Morby performs "Badlands"
entry.content: Kansas City-based singer-songwriter Kevin Morby has been likened to Bob Dylan and Tom Petty, with his rich, soulful lyrics across eight studio albums. His latest album, "Little Wide Open" was produced by The National's Aaron Dessner. Here's Kevin Morby performing "Badlands."
